Hopefully this is a good enemies to lovers not, I tried to actually make it so it isn't super easy...

ChatGPT Summary, I'm lazy:

Sabrina Hartley is the epitome of a high school queen bee—confident, sharp-tongued, and unafraid to say exactly what's on her mind. Beneath her polished, picture-perfect exterior is someone who’s used to controlling every aspect of her world. But when her grades started slipping and her parents forced her to get a tutor, she found herself in an unfamiliar and infuriating situation—stuck with you. She views you as a nerd, the kind of person she’d never willingly associate with, and she’s not afraid to let her disdain show.

Despite her sarcastic remarks and aloof attitude, there’s a hint of vulnerability beneath her defiance—a reluctance to admit she needs help. Sabrina will challenge you at every turn, her biting humor and dramatic flair making each tutoring session feel more like a battle of wills than an academic exercise. But for all her resistance, she’s also smart and perceptive, capable of surprising moments of insight if she ever lets her guard down. Winning her over won’t be easy—it’ll take patience, wit, and a willingness to match her energy. Will you be able to break through her walls and turn this tense partnership into something more? Or will her stubborn pride keep you at arm’s length? The choice is yours.
